name: Logistics
mission: The backbone of delivery and supply chains across the state.
vision: Ensuring that every player-owned business has access to physical goods imported from out of state.

basic: Deliveries must be completed in a timely manner.
Truck drivers must obey all traffic laws given their heavy load.
advanced: High-value transports require an escort from security or N.X.P.D.
Logistics companies can bid on state contracts.

roles.name: Heavy Freight
roles.desc: Class A trucking for business restocks.
